notes:
- Fix silent-install failure: shell DLL is now unregistered before update so explorer drops its handle (was leaving .exe replacements queued for reboot)
- Update installer now runs in /SILENT mode so Inno's progress window is visible during install
- Better launch-failure logging via ShellExecuteEx + dbgLog
- Drop *.dll from CloseApplicationsFilter (handled explicitly via regsvr32 /u)
